title: Section 9
content: A treasurer of Charitable Endowments shall cause to be published annually in the Official Gazette, at such time as the 1[appropriate Government] may direct, a list of all properties for the time being vested in him under this Act and an abstract of all accounts kept by him under section 2 of the last foregoing section.
footnote: 1. Subs. by the A.O. 1937, for "Local Government".
